name: Cheesy Chicken Vegetable Casserole
recipeIngredient: 20 oz (2 packages) frozen broccoli and cauliflower mix with carrots
10 3/4 oz Campbell's Cream of Mushroom soup (1 can)
1 cup chopped cooked chicken or turkey
2 oz (1 jar) diced pimiento, including liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut an "X" across one side of each pouch of vegetables. Place the pouches cut-side down in an 8-inch square baking dish. Microwave on high for eight to ten minutes. Set aside.
2. Place celery in a 1-cup glass measure and cover with plastic wrap. Microwave on high for two minutes, or until softened. Empty vegetables and sauce from the pouches into the same baking dish. Add celery, soup, and chicken. Combine well and stir in pimiento gently.
3. Top with croutons. Do not cover the dish. Rotate midway through cooking, microwave on high for 10 to 12 minutes, or until bubbly hot.
